COLLECTOR-BINDING_CALL_POWER.title: Binding Call
COLLECTOR-BINDING_CALL_POWER.description: After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] applies [gold]Doom[/gold] to a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-BINDING_CALL_POWER.smartDescri: After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] applies [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-BRUISE_POWER.title: Bruise
COLLECTOR-BRUISE_POWER.description: This turn, target takes additional attack damage.
COLLECTOR-BRUISE_POWER.smartDescription: This turn, target takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional attack damage.
COLLECTOR-CANT_TOUCH_THIS_POWER.title: Can't Touch This
COLLECTOR-CANT_TOUCH_THIS_POWER.descript: When you fully block an attack, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to the attacker.
COLLECTOR-CANT_TOUCH_THIS_POWER.smartDes: When you fully block an attack, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to the attacker.
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR_DOOM_POWER.title: Doom
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR_DOOM_POWER.descripti: Loses HP at the start of its turn, removing all [gold]Doom[/gold] unless they are [gold]Afflicted[/gold].
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR_DOOM_POWER.smartDesc: Loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP at the start of its turn, removing all [gold]Doom[/gold] unless they are [gold]Afflicted[/gold].
COLLECTOR-COPY_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Gaining Card
COLLECTOR-COPY_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descripti: At the start of your next turn, add a saved card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-COPY_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your next turn, add [gold]{card}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM_PLUS_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, play [gold]You Are Mine+[/gold] on a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM_PLUS_POWER.smar: At the start of your turn, play{Amount:plural:| [blue]{Amount} [/blue]copies of} [gold]You Are Mine+[/gold] on a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM_POWER.title: Dark Lord Form
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, play [gold]You Are Mine [/gold]on a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, play{Amount:plural:| [blue]{Amount}[/blue] copies of} [gold]You Are Mine[/gold] on a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-DEATHMARKED_POWER.title: Deathmarked
COLLECTOR-DEATHMARKED_POWER.description: At the end of its turn, this enemy loses HP.
COLLECTOR-DEATHMARKED_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of its turn, this enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
COLLECTOR-DEMISE_POWER.title: Inevitable Demise
COLLECTOR-DEMISE_POWER.description: Prevent the next time [gold]Doom[/gold] would be removed from this enemy.
COLLECTOR-DEMISE_POWER.smartDescription: Prevent the next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] times} [gold]Doom[/gold] would be removed from this enemy.
COLLECTOR-DOOMED_ATTACK_POWER.title: Doomed Attack
COLLECTOR-DOOMED_ATTACK_POWER.descriptio: Your next Attack this turn applies [gold]Doom[/gold].
COLLECTOR-DOOMED_ATTACK_POWER.smartDescr: Your next Attack this turn applies [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Doom.
COLLECTOR-DOUBLE_TROUBLE_POWER.title: Double Up
COLLECTOR-DOUBLE_TROUBLE_POWER.descripti: Your next Collected card this turn is played twice.
COLLECTOR-DOUBLE_TROUBLE_POWER.smartDesc: Your next {Amount:plural:|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] }Collected {Amount:plural:card:cards} this turn {Amount:plural:is|are} played twice.
COLLECTOR-EMPOWER_POWER.title: Empower
COLLECTOR-EMPOWER_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Strength[/gold].
COLLECTOR-EMPOWER_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your next {Turns:plural:turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
COLLECTOR-FEEL_MY_PAIN_POWER.title: Feel My Pain
COLLECTOR-FEEL_MY_PAIN_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, a random enemy loses HP.
COLLECTOR-FEEL_MY_PAIN_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, a random enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
COLLECTOR-FINALIZE_POWER.title: Finalized
COLLECTOR-KARMA_POWER.title: Karma
COLLECTOR-KARMA_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if any enemy is [gold]Afflicted[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-KARMA_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if any enemy is [gold]Afflicted[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-OMEN_POWER.title: Omen
COLLECTOR-PROTECTING_CALL_POWER.title: Protecting Call
COLLECTOR-PROTECTING_CALL_POWER.descript: After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] gives you [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-PROTECTING_CALL_POWER.smartDes: After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] gives you [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-PYROMANCY_POWER.title: Crackle
COLLECTOR-PYROMANCY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reserve[/gold].
COLLECTOR-PYROMANCY_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Reserve[/gold].
COLLECTOR-RAGING_CALL_POWER.title: Raging Call
COLLECTOR-RAGING_CALL_POWER.description: After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] deals damage to ALL enemies.
COLLECTOR-RAGING_CALL_POWER.smartDescrip: After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
COLLECTOR-RESERVE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Next Turn Reserve
COLLECTOR-RESERVE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descri: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reserves[/gold].
COLLECTOR-RESERVE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartD: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Reserves[/gold].
COLLECTOR-SCORCHED_POWER.title: Scorched
COLLECTOR-SCORCHED_POWER.description: At the end of its turn, gains [gold]Doom[/gold].
COLLECTOR-SCORCHED_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of its turn, gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold]
COLLECTOR-SHOOTING_STAR_POWER.title: Shooting Star
COLLECTOR-SHOOTING_STAR_POWER.descriptio: The first time you [gold]Pyre[/gold] an Attack each turn, gain a copy of it. It costs [blue]0[/blue] until played.
COLLECTOR-SHOOTING_STAR_POWER.smartDescr: The first {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] times} you [gold]Pyre[/gold] an Attack each turn, gain a copy of it. It costs [blue]0[/blue] until played.
COLLECTOR-SUFFERING_POWER.title: Suffering
COLLECTOR-SUFFERING_POWER.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] also apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to them.
COLLECTOR-SUFFERING_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] also apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to them.
COLLECTOR-THIMBLE_HELM_POWER.title: Thimble Helm
COLLECTOR-THIMBLE_HELM_POWER.description: While [gold]Torchhead[/gold] is alive, gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] from cards.
COLLECTOR-THIMBLE_HELM_POWER.smartDescri: While [gold]Torchhead[/gold] is alive, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold] from cards.
